blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for identity verification is satisfied as per the evidence provided.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for identity verification, which includes ID upload and facial recognition, as outlined in the linked use case. The scenario explicitly mentions that during the check-in process, ID verification and facial matching are performed, confirming that the requirement is covered. Additionally, the evidence from the linked use case supports the need for identity verification, thus fulfilling the requirement.
